query:
-- Check what location fields exist and find workers near Bnei Brak
SELECT id, name, email, phone, 
       "workerLocation", "preferredCity", "workerSearchCity",
       "workerLatitude", "workerLongitude",
       "notificationPrefs"
FROM users
WHERE role = 'user'
  AND status = 'active'
  AND (
    "preferredCity" ILIKE '%בני%'
    OR "workerLocation" ILIKE '%בני%'
    OR "workerSearchCity" ILIKE '%בני%'
    OR "preferredCity" ILIKE '%bnei%'
    OR "workerLocation" ILIKE '%bnei%'
  )
LIMIT 50;
